title: Dallas 311 Sample Dashboard
description: Curated sample dashboard showing how Dallas 311 service requests can be explored through governed aggregate blocks.
prompt: Show Dallas 311 service requests by category and ZIP code for 2024.

sources.queryMethod: Curated gallery sample rendered from a validated CanvasDocument fixture.
caveats: Gallery canvases use checked-in sample data for repeatable demos.
Dallas ZIP-level views remain sample fallback until a live non-sensitive ZIP aggregate is verified.

props.heading: Dallas 311 requests concentrate in a few service categories.
props.text: This curated example demonstrates the governed canvas format with aggregate counts, ZIP context, and source/method attribution.
bullets: Sample fallback keeps the demo deterministic.
Only allowlisted aggregate fields are shown.

props.label: Sample records
props.helperText: Rows in the local fallback sample

props.title: ZIP-level request context
props.legend: Bubble size reflects sample request count.
props.note: ZIP geography is approximate and for context only.

props.title: Sample request detail
props.caption: Aggregate-safe table excerpt for the curated gallery.

attribution.queryMethod: Curated gallery sample rendered from a validated CanvasDocument fixture.
caveats: Gallery canvases use checked-in sample data for repeatable demos.
Dallas ZIP-level views remain sample fallback until a live non-sensitive ZIP aggregate is verified.

props.methodology: The gallery fixture is checked in as validated CanvasDocument JSON and rendered only through the allowlisted block registry.
